bird.name: 藏马鸡
bird.summary: 藏马鸡（学名：Crossoptilon harmani），又名哈曼马鸡，是鸡形目雉科马鸡属鸟类，分布于西藏等地。该物种的模式产地在西藏拉萨以东220公里。也是唯一在中国之外的地区有分布的马鸡属鸟类。 分布 藏马鸡分布在西藏境内喜马拉雅山东北麓和念青唐古拉山脉，近些年在印度北部阿…

locations.name: 印度
locations.summary: 印度共和国（印地語：भारत गणराज्य，羅馬化：Bhārat Gaṇarājya，英語：Republic of India），通称印度（印地語：भारत，羅馬化：Bhārat；英語：India），是位于南亚次大陆上的国家，面积位列世…

relations.subject: 藏马鸡
relations.evidence: |year=1881|title= On a new Crossoptilon| journal=Ibis |volume=4|pages= 399–401|url= https://www.biodiversitylibrary.org/page/16251672}} | synonyms = }} The Tibetan eared pheasant (Crossoptilon harmani), also called Elwes' eared pheasant, is a species of bird in the family Phasianidae found in southeast Tibet and adjacent northern India, usually between elevation, but has been seen down to in winter

relations.subject: 藏马鸡
relations.evidence: Seen in bushy and grassy clearings, rhododendron thickets, and tall dense scrub in valleys, these birds are threatened by habitat destruction and hunting
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 藏马鸡
relations.evidence: Seen in bushy and grassy clearings, rhododendron thickets, and tall dense scrub in valleys, these birds are threatened by habitat destruction and hunting
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
